title: orchard scanner support is missing — Orchard notes silently not received
description: scanner.rs scan_tx only iterates tx.outputs (Sapling outputs). CompactTx also has orchard_actions. Orchard-only UA is accepted by unified.rs and address generation works (orchard.rs), but the scanner never trial-decrypts Orchard actions. A wallet configured with Orchard addresses will silently miss all incoming Orchard payments. Half-baked: Orchard key derivation, address encoding, and UA assembly exist but scanning does not.
